title: acanthopanax wilsonii var. pilosulus
intro: Acanthopanax wilsonii var. pilosulus, also known as Chinese thorowax or Wilson's thorowax, is a plant species in the family Araliaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and adaptogenic effects. The health benefits of Acanthopanax wilsonii var. pilosulus include reducing stress and anxiety, improving cardiovascular health, and enhancing immune function. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, tincture, or capsule, making it a popular herbal remedy in some parts of Asia.
